name: Challenger Limited
analysis: CGF has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 1% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$9.5900, stop A$8.6179, target A$12.5062 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
